submissionVideo.description: Walter-recorded live proof video showing both Run Mission and Ask Godspeed.

result.title: Godspeed Demo
result.foundryOutput:
Agent: Godspeed-Agentic-Defense v6

Mission Summary:
Godspeed classified the scenario as a Phishing / identity compromise involving suspected Microsoft 365 token theft after a phishing campaign. The mission focuses on investigation, evidence gathering, detection coverage assessment, safe lab-first validation for mitigation plans, and blocking any risky production actions behind explicit human approval gates. No production remediation steps are taken without approval.

Selected Specialist Agents:
- Mission Analyst: Defines mission goals, boundaries, unknowns, decision points.
- Threat Intelligence Agent: Maps attacker behavior and validates evidence.
- Log Coverage Agent: Checks telemetry for exposure and detection gaps.
- Evidence & Audit Agent: Captures facts, assumptions, source data, unresolved unknowns, and approvals.
- Containment Agent (standby): Prepares isolation and credential rotation options behind approval gates.
- Communications Draft Agent (standby): Drafts internal updates and briefings.
- Identity & Access Agent: Assesses sign-in anomalies and privileged account risks.
- Mail Security Agent: Reviews phishing mail flow and impacts.

Approval Gates:
- Disable or reset user accounts (blocked until explicit approval)
- Purge messages from mailboxes (blocked)
- Revoke sessions or tokens tenant-wide (blocked)
- Send external status update (requires approval)

Action Plan:
- Immediate: Create phishing/identity compromise mission brief (Mission Analyst with Evidence & Audit and Threat Intel)
- Immediate: Map evidence sources and detect telemetry gaps (Log Coverage, Identity & Access, Evidence & Audit)
- Short-term: Build lab-first mitigation and rollback plan (Mission Analyst, Patch & Change, Containment)
- Short-term: Draft approval request for patch or containment (Evidence & Audit, Containment, Communications Draft)
- 30 days: Convert lessons learned into repeatable playbook (Communications Draft, Mission Analyst, Evidence & Audit)

Evidence Package:
- Fa
result.askOutput:
Agent: Godspeed-Agentic-Defense v6

Yes, this agent is real and active. The current route is: website -> Godspeed backend -> Azure AI Foundry agent -> Godspeed OpenAPI tool and knowledge layer.
